name: Executive Impersonation Social Engineering Actors
description: Executive Impersonation Social Engineering Actors are financially motivated threat actors that impersonate CEOs, presidents, CFOs, or other senior leaders to manipulate employees into performing unauthorized actions such as purchasing gift cards, changing payroll information, resetting passwords,...
strategic_objectives: Convince employees to purchase and send gift cards for rapid
Abuse trust in executive authority to bypass security contro
Trigger password resets or MFA changes for account takeover
